scripts.audit: npm audit fix && npm --prefix card audit fix
scripts.format: npm run format:card && npm run format:python
scripts.install-updates: npm i --save && npm run install-updates --if-present --prefix card
scripts.lint:card: npm --prefix card run lint && npm --prefix card run type-check
scripts.lint:python: cd custom_components && ruff check --fix && uv run --quiet --python 3.14 --with-requirements ../requirements-dev.txt mypy --config-file ./mypy.ini cameraui && cd ..
scripts.lint: npm run lint:card && npm run lint:python
